name: Postmark API
what_it_does: High-deliverability transactional email API focused on fast inbox delivery for password resets, receipts, and critical notifications.
use_cases: Sending time-critical transactional emails (password resets, OTPs)
Receipt and confirmation email delivery from agent workflows
Monitoring email delivery and bounce handling
not_for: Marketing or bulk email campaigns (they explicitly block this)
Teams needing a large free tier
best_when: An agent needs to send critical transactional emails with the highest possible deliverability guarantees.
avoid_when: You need to send any marketing content or need a cheap bulk sender.

auth.notes: Server API token in X-Postmark-Server-Token header. Account-level and server-level tokens available. Clean and simple.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 100 test emails/month forever free (test mode only)
pricing.paid_tiers: From $15/month for 10k emails, scales to enterprise
pricing.notes: No credit card required for free tier. Test mode available for development. Production emails require paid plan.

performance.rate_limits: Varies by plan, typically burst to 500/sec

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Postmark has excellent error code documentation with numbered codes and specific fix guidance. Best error messages in the transactional email space.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No idempotency support. Recommend tracking MessageID from response to detect duplicates.
known_agent_gotchas: Test mode emails are never delivered - easy to forget to switch to production stream
Marketing content is strictly prohibited and accounts can be suspended
Domain DKIM/SPF setup required for production use
Message streams separate transactional from broadcast - agents must use correct stream
